rag_rules: Use assume/guarantee labels and eq/const declarations with valid AGREE syntax
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use authoritative AADL model for component names, ports, and connections
generic_rules: Treat visible parameters like legal AGREE identifiers in the owning subprogram scope
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names for type scope range assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE scalar declaration types int, real, and bool
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use invalid AGREE type names in const or eq declarations
irrelevant_topics: Compact requirement semantics and model traceability
